blockingIssues.description: ZIP context scoring is case-insensitive while matching two-letter state abbreviations, so ordinary words like "in" can falsely trigger labeled-context confidence boosts for standalone ZIP-like matches.
Text-item deduplication key includes item text instead of position-only criteria, so same-position overlapping items with different strings are not deduplicated as required.
redactDocument accumulates 300-DPI canvases across pages and repackages only after the loop, violating the required sequential render→burn→embed→release memory contract.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add explicit testing guidance for pdfjs-dist under Vitest/jsdom: mock pdfjs-dist/DOMMatrix dependencies and mock HTMLCanvasElement 2D context APIs for redaction tests.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Both pdf-loader and redaction-pipeline reviews reported avoidable friction from missing jsdom + pdfjs-dist + canvas mocking guidance.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add detector-pipeline regression checklist items for (a) cross-line regex false positives and (b) same-position/different-string text-item dedup tests.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: detection-pipeline required newline-span filtering, and text-indexer-and-coords missed position-only dedup semantics due insufficient explicit regression guidance.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Align canonical EntityType examples with current source-of-truth naming to avoid stale aliases in implementation guidance.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: core-types-and-patterns and merger-and-modes reviews both flagged stale entity-name references causing worker ambiguity.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Clarify jsPDF setProperties example for TypeScript strict mode (e.g., avoid unsupported `producer` field or note typing-safe alternative).
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: redaction-pipeline review observed TypeScript friction from AGENTS pattern using `producer` not present in strict jsPDF DocumentProperties typings.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Surface merger tie-break expectations for overlapping multi-layer detections (or explicitly reference authoritative _docs section) so future merger logic does not drift.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: merger-and-modes review flagged that tie-break conventions exist in _docs but are not surfaced in worker-facing guidance.

rejectedObservations.observation: Shared architecture docs contain stale entity-type examples that do not match current EntityType union.
Shared library docs do not currently capture the jsdom/pdfjs-dist DOMMatrix limitation and recommended unit-test mocking pattern.
A pdfjs-dist typing quirk (convertToViewportPoint typed as any[] instead of tuple) is not captured in shared library docs.
